A programmer puts two glasses on his bedside table before going to sleep. A full one, in case he gets thirsty, and an empty one, in case he doesn’t.
To understand what recursion is... You must first understand what recursion is
How many programmers does it take to change a lightbulb? None that's a hardware problem
Why don't programmers like nature? There's too many bugs.
Why did the private classes break up? Because they never saw each other.
Why did the developer go broke? They kept spending all their cache.
Why do programmers always get Christmas and Halloween mixed up? Because DEC 25 = OCT 31
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'
Hey, wanna hear a joke? Parsing HTML with regex.
Knock-knock. A race condition. Who is there?
Which side of the chicken has more feathers? The outside.
What do you call a group of disorganized cats? A cat-tastrophe.
Why did the cookie cry? Because his mother was a wafer so long
Why did the house go to the doctor? It was having window panes.
Did you hear the one about the guy with the broken hearing aid? Neither did he.
Why can't a bicycle stand on its own? It's two-tired.
What kind of music do welders like? Heavy metal.
What do you call a girl between two posts? Annette.
What kind of bagel can fly? A plain bagel.
What did the big flower say to the littler flower? Hi, bud!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Little old lady. 
 Little old lady who? I didn't know you could yodel!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!
